No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports a connection to eradicating poverty.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports a connection to ending hunger or improving nutrition.

Quality Education.reason: The course is a master's level program ('日文碩一'), directly contributing to quality tertiary education (Target 4.3). It also aims to '培養專業知能' (cultivate professional knowledge), aligning with Target 4.4 for relevant skills.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course aims to '培養專業知能' (cultivate professional knowledge), which equips students with specialized skills, indirectly contributing to full and productive employment and decent work (Target 8.5).

Reduced Inequalities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports a connection to reducing inequalities.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports a connection to consumption or production patterns.

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports a connection to climate action.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports a connection to marine life.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports a connection to terrestrial ecosystems.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports a connection to peace, justice, or institutions.

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course includes required readings from international scholars (e.g., Hopper, Thompson, Narock Heiko), demonstrating engagement with global academic knowledge sharing, which aligns with Target 17.6.
